name: crm-dedupe
description: Standalone CRM dedupe plugin with focused Codex skills for safe backfills, contact and company dedupe, merge review, and daily hygiene.

interface.shortDescription: Run guarded CRM dedupe backfills and daily hygiene.
interface.longDescription: A standalone CRM dedupe plugin with bundled scoring, blocking, review, and HubSpot integration code. It breaks dedupe operations into focused skills: orchestrating the workflow, validating HubSpot exports, running contact and company dedupe agents, reviewing merge safety, and scheduling daily high-confidence cleanup.
defaultPrompt: Use $crm-dedupe-orchestrator to clean up my HubSpot duplicate backlog safely.
Use $contact-dedupe-agent to dry-run the first 25 exported contact duplicates.
Use $daily-crm-hygiene after backlog cleanup to keep high-confidence dupes clear.
